category_sources: source_facts.description says dotdrop saves dotfiles once and deploys them everywhere.

docs_sources: Official Read the Docs documentation covers getting started and usage for dotdrop.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/deadc0de6/dotdrop; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
